name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skylence multi-LLM marketplace: core baseline and soloterm agent-org plugins for Grok, Claude, Codex, Antigravity.

plugins.name: core-claude-grok
plugins.description: Unified baseline for Claude Code + Grok (via compatibility). /core-claude-grok:setup seeds judge-rules + guidelines, wires posture (or sets compat flag on Grok). Ships dual judge-hook, writing-guard, research-nudge, core-hud. /core-claude-grok:doctor audits.

plugins.name: soloterm-agent-org-claude-grok
plugins.description: Unified agent-org for Claude + Grok. Bundles Solo MCP + orchestrator, planner, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit, capacity-check + build-slot/ghost-probe. Dual-compatible session discipline hooks.
